name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-29
title: new-feature.py scaffolds bash test/run.sh and feature.json missing template_version (violates Python-only and template_version conventions)
description: scripts/new-feature.py at lines 141-151 creates a test/run.sh file with bash shebang ('#!/bin/bash'). This violates the spec's Python-only runtime mandate (spec.md Tech Stack section, Inv 39, Inv 40) and contract.md never-list entry forbidding new .sh runtime scripts. The scaffolded run.sh exits 1 as a TDD-red placeholder, so the bash content is intentional placeholder code — but it should be Python ('#!/usr/bin/env python3') to remain consistent with the workflow's tech stack. Also, the scaffolded feature.json lacks 'template_version' field that contract.md template_version='2.0.0' standard requires; new scaffolds drift from current template conventions immediately.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3: BUG-29 new-feature.py scaffolds .py runner + template_version; BUG-31 rabbit-project.md uses real .py paths; BUG-52 human-approval messages name marker+effect.
